name: voice-pr
description: Scroll your PR diff and talk. Comments anchor to what you're viewing and go to a pre-warmed Cursor coding agent. Local Whisper STT; webcam gaze runs on-device.

record-on-pr.description: voice-pr: start recording on the current PR

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:4100 https://tfhub.dev https://www.kaggle.com https://storage.googleapis.com;
